A modern take on your everyday black shirt featuring an edgy back-tie detail, the Waterfall Shirt’s back panel steals the show with its checked pattern, making a statement as you walk away.

A fuchsia heart embroidery is placed inside the placket, between the 2nd and 3rd buttons.This subtle yet striking detail adds a unique touch to the garment’s design.

Dress this piece up or down for effortless style to throw on and go.

Due to the uneven checks and colours of the fabric, each back tie will vary slightly, adding to the unique beauty of this style.

name: Basic Pyjama - Black & Mulberry Printed
description:
name: Basic Pyjama - Black & Mulberry Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Basic Pyjamas take on a new rhythm this season, reimagined in a striking black-and-mulberry print that feels bold, fluid, and unmistakably festive.

Crafted in soft, lightweight Bemberg, the silhouette stays true to its easy flared fit while the all-over floral print brings a touch of drama to the mix.

Contrast palm flowers bloom across the surface, adding movement and character to a pair designed to work effortlessly with kurtas, shirts, and every look you’re putting together.

name: Pattaya Kurta with Slip - Watermelon
description:
name: Pattaya Kurta with Slip - Watermelon, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Pattaya Kurta is fresh and full of quiet detail—made for moments that feel unhurried.

Crafted in yarn-dyed cotton-silk checks in watermelon and white, it’s paired with a tonal slip trimmed in ivory crochet lace at the neckline and hem.

A mint heart is embroidered at the sleeve hem, just beside the cuff pleat—small, intentional, and easy to miss (but never forget).

name: Vintage Camisole - Fuchsia & Gold Printed
description:
name: Vintage Camisole - Fuchsia & Gold Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
This vintage-inspired adjustable camisole offers lightweight comfort with a delicate drape. The soft fuchsia base is adorned with tiny gold floral prints, adding a subtle shimmer that feels both timeless and elegant. 

Made from 100% organic cotton voile.

Perfect for layering or wearing on its own, it brings effortless charm to your everyday wardrobe.

name: Hampi Top - Ivory
description:
name: Hampi Top - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Comfy, glowing and in a relaxed silhouette, the Hampi Top in ivory is a versatile celebration piece.Blending artisanal detailing with an easy fit, it effortlessly bridges everyday ease and occasion dressing.

Crafted in a luxurious cotton-viscose mashru, the fabric offers a gentle sheen with a fluid, soft drape, ideal for transitional weather and festive layering. Its breathable yet refined texture adds depth to the saturated colour.

Tailored with clean lines and minimal seams, the top features thoughtfully finished facings and a moonpatch, all blind-hemmed for an understated, seamless finish. 

Spot a delicate rainbow sequin star with small green sequins and green bead, hand-embroidered on the wearer’s right sleeve. This subtle embellishment adds a touch of whimsy and sparkle, capturing the spirit of celebration.

name: Fit & Flare Angrakha - Red & Ivory Embroidered
description:
name: Fit & Flare Angrakha - Red & Ivory Embroidered, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A nod to tradition with a modern ease, the Fit & Flare Angrakha is brought to life with delicate ivory rose embroidery, scattered across a bold red canvas. 

Crafted in soft, breathable cotton.

Designed with side seam pockets, its silhouette flatters while flowing effortlessly.

name: Front Pleated Kurta - Charcoal & Watermelon Print
description:
name: Front Pleated Kurta - Charcoal & Watermelon Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Front Pleated Kurta is all contrast and calm—graphic, grounded, and made to move with you.

Printed with watermelon peonies on a deep charcoal Chanderi base, it’s finished with mint-thread buttons at each cuff and a silver zari heart embroidered at the centre back.

With a straight, relaxed silhouette and subtle side slits, it’s an easy pick for days that ask for quiet celebration.

name: Tribe Dress - Red & Green Printed
description:
name: Tribe Dress - Red & Green Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Tribe Dress features a playful green base dotted with medium red prints—lightweight, breathable, and perfect for everyday ease. A standout piece that’s ideal for your everyday and light celebrations.

Crafted in 100% organic cotton voile.

Designed with side pockets in matching shell fabric and finished with a neat baby hem, this dress combines comfort with subtle detailing.

Spot a green Mashru heart patch adds a touch of handcrafted charm, placed on the wearer’s right side of the skirt.

name: Basic Long Length Kurta - Ivory
description:
name: Basic Long Length Kurta - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
This easy-wearing kurta falls below the knee, woven with a floral ivory buta all over in a neutral shade of ivory.

Crafted in sumtous cotton silk, the relaxed cut makes it easy to pair with any outfit, adding a touch of effortless style to your look. 

Find a hand embroidered beaded line with green and pink flower at the back. The gusset has round mirror created with real mirror work, to be handled with care.

A delicate ode to India’s traditional shisha embroidery, this piece reimagines the craft with a contemporary twist making it modern Indian.

Pair with our Basic Pyjamas for a festive look.

name: Calicut Top - White & Purple Printed
description:
name: Calicut Top - White & Purple Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Breezy and light, the Calicut Top is a playful nod to tropical travels and lazy summer days. 
Featuring an all-over floral parrot print in white and purple, it brings a dash of whimsy to everyday dressing

Crafted from 100% organic cotton voile, it’s soft, airy, and gentle on the skin—perfect for warmer days.

The easy A-line silhouette flatters while allowing freedom to move and breathe.

Effortless and expressive, it’s a piece that brings joy in both form and feeling.

name: Aoi Pants - Red & White Stripes
description:
name: Aoi Pants - Red & White Stripes, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Aoi Pants make a statement in bold red and white stripes—eye-catching, confident, and full of ease.

Crafted in 100% cotton, they feature contrast button detailing at the hem for a little extra flair.

Wear them when the mood calls for something playful, with personality.

name: Jaisalmer Pants - Ivory
description:
name: Jaisalmer Pants - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Jaisalmer Pants offer timeless elegance with modern functionality. Perfect for pairing with both casual and dressy tops, these pants bring effortless style to your wardrobe.

Crafted from crisp, breathable 100% cotton

Spot a mashru heart patch adorning the wearer’s left pocket.

name: Double Layer Dress - Fuchsia & Purple Print
description:
name: Double Layer Dress - Fuchsia & Purple Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Built to be a staple for all seasons, our Double Layer Dress is great for a day at work or a meal with friends. Bold poppies meet breezy ease in this vibrant A-line dress, inspired by tropical escapes and carefree days.

Crafted in featherlight 100% organic cotton voile, it features a striking all-over print on a rich fuchsia base.

A hidden inner layer of checks adds depth and surprise—a quiet contrast beneath the vivid florals.

The bright print and relaxed cut makes this an easy pick to spend your day in adding a touch of effortless style to your look.

name: Shiro Beach Dress - White & Fuchsia Print
description:
name: Shiro Beach Dress - White & Fuchsia Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Shiro Beach Dress is bright in white and fuchsia with ditsy roses all over. Made from 100% organic cotton, the dress features a soft white base adorned with a delicate ditsy rose print in fuchsia.

The cotton twisted dori ties in the front are finished with sweet heart-shaped buttons at the ends, adding a charming detail. 

The subtle embroidery at the cuffs further elevates the design, making this dress a standout choice for beach days or casual outings. 

Light, breezy, and full of character, it’s an easy pick to add a touch of joy to your summer wardrobe.

name: Delilah Dress - Red & White
description:
name: Delilah Dress - Red & White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 The Delilah Dress draws inspiration from the Tingatinga art of Zanzibar, depicting a stylised and abstract take on the flowers we spotted on our travels.The relaxed fit features a twist back detail, making it an easy pick for summer days. 

 Designed with your convenience in mind, the dress features hanger loops for easy storage. 

 In soft, organic cotton voile, this dress will leave you feeling light as air. 

 Pair it with any of the scarves from our Zanzibar collection.

name: Gokarna Shorts - Olive
description:
name: Gokarna Shorts - Olive, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Built for detours, pit stops, and spontaneous hikes—these shorts were made to roam. Blending the calm of the desert with the wild spirit of the jungle, Safar is a collection designed for exploration—capturing the journey within, before it even begins.

Tailored in crisp cotton poplin in a solid olive hue, with asymmetrical pocket sizes that nod to the unpredictable rhythm of the wild.

A rust-toned paw embroidery on the wearer’s right-side pocket flap leaves a quiet trail behind.

name: Nico Dress - Fuchsia
description:
name: Nico Dress - Fuchsia, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A style that has become our signature, the Nico Dress is an ankle-grazing wrap dress crafted from luxurious Habutai Silk in a solid pink hue. Perfect for brunch, a party, or even Wednesday, the Nico Dress is the ultimate desk-to-dinner piece.

This maxi dress features a wrap V neckline, two-button closure at the waist, and a front slit that offers a touch of extra legroom—making it look especially stunning in motion. It comes thoughtfully designed with easy pockets.

Adding a charming finishing touch, the back moonpatch is adorned with a red heart embroidery, making each dress uniquely special.

name: Chaand Kurta - Black
description:
name: Chaand Kurta - Black, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Chaand Kurta shines in a rich solid red, offering a fluid drape with a soft sheen. The fabric lends itself beautifully to both everyday elegance and festive dressing.

Crafted in viscose silk.

Ivory boondi stitch detailing runs along the side seams and sleeve seams, adding subtle contrast. Functional pockets are placed discreetly along the side seams.

A large heart-shaped mirror is criss-cross stitched in red and outlined with green at the centre back moon patch, created with real mirror work, to be handled with care.

A delicate ode to India’s traditional shisha embroidery, this piece reimagines the craft with a contemporary twist making it modern Indian.

name: Airport Hoodie - Grey
description:
name: Airport Hoodie - Grey, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Airport Hoodie in Grey is made from 100% cotton single jersey in a soft grey.

Offering a relaxed and comfortable fit, it features a classic hoodie design with a subtle yet stylish paw print on the back yoke, positioned at the WLS bottom corner. 

Perfect for when you're travelling.

name: Strappy Blouse - Yellow & Pink Print
description:
name: Strappy Blouse - Yellow & Pink Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Strappy and striped in yellow and pink, this blouse is a wardrobe essential.

Crafted in cotton silk, this blouse will leave you feeling light as air.

The blouse has vertical stripes at the front and back and horizontal stripes on the bust band. 

This blouse pairs with the saris from our Morocco collection.

name: Jambiani Skirt - Green & Red Print
description:
name: Jambiani Skirt - Green & Red Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Jambiani Skirt features roses all over. The roses are inspired by our travels to Morocco, symbolizing love, beauty, and purity, and are prominently featured in weddings, festivals, and religious ceremonies.

Crafted in cotton, this skirt floats lighter than air.

Dress this piece up or down, whatever the occasion calls for.

Gold gota binding accents the bottom hem and right side ocket mouth, while green DTM cotton twill tape adorns the waistband. 

The twill tape is further embellished with tassels, buttons, and bead details.

name: Puff Pants - Yellow
description:
name: Puff Pants - Yellow, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 With fantastic flare, the yellow Puff Pants playfully combine a narrow fit with cheeky pocket details to keep you feeling bright and breezy. 

 The pockets provide a mix of style and convenience. 

 In soft yarn dyed cotton, these pants will leave you feeling light as air. 

 Pair it with any of the tops from our Zanzibar collection.

name: Paperbag Pants - Black & Red
description:
name: Paperbag Pants - Black & Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Comfort meets style with Nicobar’s Paperbag pants.The rich culture of Thailand is the inspiration behind Nicobar’s Paperbag pants. The beautiful and bold print of small red roses against a black background makes it a perfect fit for evening drinks or a simple get together with the girls. 

Come with pockets. 

 Crafted in buttery Bemberg. Bemberg is extremely breathable and perfect all year around. The fabric is biodegradable as well.

name: Katerina Skirt - White
description:
name: Katerina Skirt - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Katerina Skirt offers a chic, modern twist on a classic silhouette. 

Crafted from 100% cotton, it features a solid black and white selvedge stripe that runs along the side seams, adding to its design. 

Spot a fuchsia heart embroidery at the front pocket.

name: Collared Dress - Ivory
description:
name: Collared Dress - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Feeling fancy but want to stay comfy? Our Collared Dress in ivory crafted in cotton linen is a fashion must-grab.

 Featuring a green heart button for a playful vibe along with tie-up sleeves and a Zanzibar-inspired crow embroidery for added elegance and character.

 Its broad grey & ivory stripes add a modern twist to a classic silhouette.

name: Strappy Dress - Blue
description:
name: Strappy Dress - Blue, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A bold and breezy piece, fit-and-flare dress is crafted in 100% cotton and features blue tribal shibori
patterns. 

This dress effortlessly transitions from downtime at home to days spent outdoors.

Crafted in light cotton, this makes for a comfy pick for days on the go.

Spot a red star embroidered at the lower pocket.

name: Midori Dress - Green
description:
name: Midori Dress - Green, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Slip into this linen cotton green dress for an effortlessly elegant look that's perfect for lazy brunches, leisurely strolls, or impromptu picnics in the park.

 It features selvedge detailing at the centre back seam and yoke horizontal seam, with a fuchsia geometric heart on the right side pocket corner.

 Pair it with sandals for a laid-back vibe or dress it up with heels and statement jewellery for a more polished look.

name: Basic Pyjamas - Ivory Chikankari
description:
name: Basic Pyjamas - Ivory Chikankari, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A style that's come to be our signature, this pyjama features an a-line silhouette that ends in a gentle flare and a border of chikankari embroidery.

Crafted in lightweight kora cotton with organza pannels on the side, it pairs perfectly with kurtas and shirts alike, and promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet.

The soft, neutral palette of ivory accentuates the intricate craftsmanship of the embroidery, creating a harmonious interplay of texture and tone.

The 4th season of the ‘Aparna Chandra for Nicobar’ line is luxe, limited edition, and rooted in India’s craft traditions.

Som (सोम) is named after the nectar of the gods and over 40 hours of meticulous hand-work and craftsmanship have gone into creating this garment.

name: Narrow Pants - Ivory
description:
name: Narrow Pants - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A style that's come to be our signature, these pants feature a narrow silhouette in etheral ivory.

Crafted in lightweight cotton voile, it pairs perfectly with kurtas and shirts alike, and promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet

The 4th season of the ‘Aparna Chandra for Nicobar’ line is luxe, limited edition, and rooted in India’s craft traditions.

Som (सोम) is named after the nectar of the gods and over 1,000 hours of meticulous hand-work and craftsmanship have gone into creating this line.

name: Lolo Gathered Top - Green & Red Print
description:
name: Lolo Gathered Top - Green & Red Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Lolo Gathered Top is perfect for any occasion with its sea of chintz roses on a green background, whether it's a day at the office or for festivities.

Crafted in cotton silk, this top will leave you feeling light as air.

Dress this piece up or down for your everyday or celebrations alike.

Spot silver triangle gota on the neckline and armhole in the front and back.

name: Kosi Kurta - Ivory Embroidered
description:
name: Kosi Kurta - Ivory Embroidered, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Kosi Kurta offers a crisp, clean silhouette in a timeless ivory. Delicate multi-sequin hand embroidery adorns the front and back yoke, adding a gentle shimmer inspired by traditional khaka patterns. A perfect blend of simplicity and subtle embellishment.

Crafted from 100% cotton.

Heart-shaped patches in ivory mushru grace the pockets on both side seams, lending a handcrafted touch.

Thoughtful details elevate the design, including pocket bags and yoke binding made from soft shell fabric for a subtle contrast in texture.

name: Belur Kurta - Multicolour Checks
description:
name: Belur Kurta - Multicolour Checks, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Belur Kurta features vibrant multicolour checks that bring a playful yet grounded charm.Designed with a flattering scoop neckline, it's detailed with delicate embroidery and subtle gota accents that add a festive glint without overpowering the look.

Crafted in 100% yarn-dyed cotton. 

Lightweight and breathable, it's a versatile piece that transitions effortlessly from everyday wear to casual celebrations.

name: Necktie Top - Ivory Embroidered
description:
name: Necktie Top - Ivory Embroidered, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Light on the skin, rich in detail. This is everyday dressing with a finer touch.

Crafted in undyed cotton kora and embroidered all over in tonal ivory florals, it reveals its texture up close, not all at once.

Finished with a clean neckline tie and a gently flared silhouette, it’s cut to move with ease—and linger in memory.

name: Memento Kurta - Denim
description:
name: Memento Kurta - Denim, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Memento Kurta brings a relaxed, lived-in ease to winter, its soft blue denim carrying that familiar, effortless charm of a well-worn favourite.

Crafted in medium-wash cotton denim, it’s designed in an easy silhouette that moves comfortably through the day.

Two subtle heart impressions sit along the centre-front panels, giving this everyday kurta a gentle, distinctive touch.

name: Frieda Back Gusset Dress - Chartreuse
description:
name: Frieda Back Gusset Dress - Chartreuse, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Festive and fluid, this dress comes in a bold solid chartreuse, designed to move with ease and lightness. Effortless and refined, it’s the perfect companion for festive evenings and holiday wanderings alike.

Crafted from cotton linter, a natural byproduct of cottonseed oil production, Bemberg is a regenerated cellulose fibre that’s soft, breathable, and gentle on the skin. It’s biodegradable, compostable, and made using a closed-loop process that minimises waste, making it a thoughtful choice for you and the planet.

A tonal heart patch sits playfully on the side seam.

name: Crew Neck Sweater - Ivory & Red
description:
name: Crew Neck Sweater - Ivory & Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
This crew neck keeps things simple and striking, pairing ivory with a bold deep red for a crisp, modern contrast.

Crafted in 100% organic cotton flat knit, it’s finished with clean colour blocking across the front and back.

A no-fuss winter essential that works for weekdays, weekends, and everything in between.

name: Classic Pyjamas - Ivory Embroidered
description:
name: Classic Pyjamas - Ivory Embroidered, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Nicobar’s Classic Pyjamas pair well with your basics and are the definition of comfort in ivory, detailed with tone-on-tone floral embroidery.

Crafted in 100% cotton, this is a must-have pair for your summer wardrobe.

Effortlessly breezy, these pants will leave you feeling light as air.

name: Amer Pyjamas - Black & Gold Printed
description:
name: Amer Pyjamas - Black & Gold Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A wardrobe essential with a festive twist, the Amer Pyjamas' solid black base is elevated with subtle gold print accents, making them as versatile as they are striking.

Crafted from 100% organic cotton voile.

Thoughtful details include pockets and a delicate red thread faggoting stitch that connects the panel seams—adding a handcrafted finish and a pop of unexpected color.

Ideal for lounging, layering, or pairing with statement separates for quiet celebrations.

name: Tetris Sweater - Black & Ivory
description:
name: Tetris Sweater - Black & Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Tetris Sweater brings a nostalgic, wintery charm — warm black , soft ivory, and a pattern that feels both familiar and freshly reimagined.
Knitted in 100% organic cotton yarn, it features an all-over checkered pattern in black and ivory and a bold navy heart motif at the front.
An easy cold-weather staple that layers well with denim, skirts, or anything that needs a touch of playful pattern.

name: Domino Kurta - Purple & Silver Checks
description:
name: Domino Kurta - Purple & Silver Checks, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A graceful blend of shimmer and structure, the Domino Kurta is crafted from metallic tissue featuring a striking purple and silver check pattern that catches the light with every movement. 

Designed with subtle luxury, the kurta includes shell fabric pockets.

An exquisite green and gold floral buta embroidery adorns the sleeve.

name: Jambiani Dress - Turmeric Yellow & Watermelon Print
description:
name: Jambiani Dress - Turmeric Yellow & Watermelon Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Jambiani Dress is colour, movement, and ease in perfect rhythm—made for golden hours and gatherings under trees.

Printed with watermelon peonies on a rich turmeric yellow base, the floral placement follows the A-line silhouette, flowing as you move.

A charcoal floral printed frill runs along the bottom, adding a soft contrast and extra swish to every step.

Crafted in organic cotton voile with a gentle swish, it pairs best with minimal accessories and a day that’s yours to set the pace for.

name: Mandarin Collar Top - Charcoal & Ivory Stripes
description:
name: Mandarin Collar Top - Charcoal & Ivory Stripes, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Made for days that blur work and everything after. This striped shirt walks the line between structure and softness.

Crafted in cotton voile using the shibori dyeing technique, it features charcoal and ivory stripes, a mandarin collar, and an easy, relaxed fit.

It’s the details that linger: a hidden red heart under the placket, buttons stitched in watermelon thread, and a watermelon parrot saddle-stitched at the back. Finished with a fine baby hem for just the right fall.

Shibori is a hand-dyed technique—each piece will vary slightly in pattern and tone, making it one of a kind.

name: Flourish Jacket - Red & Black
description:
name: Flourish Jacket - Red & Black, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Flourish Jacket arrives bold and confident, wrapping winter in a rush of red and black florals that feel graphic, dramatic, and impossible to miss.

Crafted in cotton stretch twill, it’s designed in a long, easy silhouette that moves effortlessly while holding its striking shape.

The abstract floral print takes centre stage here, giving this jacket its statement-making presence.

name: Lama Smocked Kurta - Charcoal & Watermelon Embroidered
description:
name: Lama Smocked Kurta - Charcoal & Watermelon Embroidered, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Lama Smocked Kurta is all charcoal ease, lifted by touches of colour placed just so.

Crafted in cotton-silk Chanderi, it features watermelon-hued embroidery at the back, cuffs and at the pocket—sharp, subtle, and quietly expressive.

Smocking along the side panels gives it gentle shape, keeping the silhouette fluid and easy through the day.

name: Pleated Waist Kurta - White
description:
name: Pleated Waist Kurta - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Pleated Waist Kurta is a fresh, elegant piece that effortlessly combines comfort with playful details. Made from 100% organic cotton, the kurta offers a light, airy feel perfect for any season.

The pleated waist adds shape and structure, while the fuchsia heart buttons on each cuff and placket bring a sweet pop of color. 

Spot an aqua star embroidery at the back, adding a subtle yet whimsical touch, elevating the overall design. 

Versatile and stylish, this kurta is perfect for both casual and more refined occasions, offering a beautiful balance of simplicity and charm.

name: Mandarin Collar Top - Multicolour Checks
description:
name: Mandarin Collar Top - Multicolour Checks, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The vibrant Mandarin Collar Top is designed as a festive staple, combining cheerful multicolour checks with handcrafted embellishments. Perfect for celebrations, it balances playful patterns with elegant detailing.

Crafted from 100% yarn-dyed cotton checks, the fabric is breathable, soft, and lightweight. The multicolour palette adds a lively and joyful touch.

The Mandarin collar leads into a neat placket featuring thoughtful highlights. The first button is hand-stitched with fuchsia thread, and the second button is a pink shell, offering playful contrast. 

At the back, just below the gathered yoke, a handcrafted beaded line ends in a beaded heart motif. A charming detail that adds a surprise element, making it one-of-a-kind.

name: Darjeeling Pants - Purple
description:
name: Darjeeling Pants - Purple, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Darjeeling Pants offer a rich, jewel-toned statement in solid purple. Designed for both ease and elegance, they're a staple in your wardrobe. 

Crafted in fluid viscose silk.

The pants feature clean lines, easy pockets and a soft, flattering drape.

A playful touch of embroidery—a fuchsia heart delicately stitched just above the hem.

Wear them to elevate everyday dressing or pair with festive separates for a look that’s both grounded and spirited.

name: Basic Pyjamas - Blue
description:
name: Basic Pyjamas - Blue, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A style that's come to be our signature, this pyjama features an a-line silhouette that ends in a gentle flare. 

The blue hue makes this an easy pick to spend your day in.

Crafted in lightweight material, it pairs perfectly with kurtas and shirts alike, and promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet.

name: Geisha Kurta - Blue
description:
name: Geisha Kurta - Blue, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Geisha Kurta in blue is a full-sleeved, fit-and-flare silhouette with an easy elegance and just enough flair.

It features a line of front buttons and a heart coin motif for that little extra something.

Pair it with tapered trousers or easy denims—it’s built to flow with whatever your day demands.

Garment-dyed for rich colour depth—each piece will carry its own unique character.

name: V-neck Flared Dress - Blue & Red
description:
name: V-neck Flared Dress - Blue & Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 The dynamic interplay of blue and red stripes, combined with the flattering fit and flare silhouette, makes this dress a wardrobe essential. 

 The dress features a play of broad and narrow stripes in shades of blue and red. 

 In yarn dyed cotton, this soft dress will leave you feeling light as air. 

 Find an embroidered red star at the back. 

 Pair it with any of the scarves from our Zanzibar collection.

name: Recess Pants - Red & White Stripes
description:
name: Recess Pants - Red & White Stripes, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The coolest and comfiest pants, the Recess Pants stand out with their yarn-dyed stripes in red and white with a relaxed fit.

Crafted in 100% organic cotton, these pants combine style and ease.

The pants feature horizontal stripes on the waistband and back pocket.

Spot an green heart embroidered at the right pocket.

name: Longline Jersey Dress - Navy
description:
name: Longline Jersey Dress - Navy, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Whether it's a casual day out or a special evening event, the navy Longline Jersey dress is a wardrobe classic. We'll be wearing this all year round- it works effortlessly for everything, from the boardroom to drinks to dinner.

Crafted in organic cotton, this dress combines form with function to bring you an easy to layer, versatile dress.

Spot a silver foiled star printed at the back.

name: Basic Pyjamas - Yellow
description:
name: Basic Pyjamas - Yellow, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Bright yellow, striped and comfy, these bottoms will leave you feeling bright and breezy through summer. 

 Easily organise and store your pyjamas, ensuring a neat and clutter-free space with the in-built hanger loops. 

 The spica elastic detail at the back guarantees both snugness and flexibility. 

 In soft yarn dyed cotton, these pants will leave you feeling light as air. 

 Pair it with any of the tops from our Zanzibar collection.

name: V-Neck Flared Kurta - Chartreuse & Gold Printed
description:
name: V-Neck Flared Kurta - Chartreuse & Gold Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Bright and bold, this flared kurta features a striking gold palm print creates a stunning contrast, bringing a touch of tropical elegance to your wardrobe.

Crafted in luxurious cotton silk chanderi.

Designed with practical side pockets and non-foiled fabric lining inside the cuffs and pockets for a subtle finish. 

A delicate rainbow flower with bead detailing adorns the cuff seam, adding a playful, handcrafted touch.

name: Ukiyo A-Line Top - Berry
description:
name: Ukiyo A-Line Top - Berry, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Ukiyo A-Line Top in Berry is crafted from 100% cotton single jersey, offering a soft and relaxed fit.

The A-line silhouette adds a flattering, easygoing shape, while the paw in rust at the WLS sleeve hem provides a bold yet subtle detail. 

Perfect for a comfortable, stylish look with a touch of personality.

name: Midi Jersey Dress - Red
description:
name: Midi Jersey Dress - Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Whether it's a casual day out or a special evening event, the red Midi Jersey dress is a wardrobe classic. We'll be wearing this all year round- it works effortlessly for everything, from the boardroom to drinks to dinner.

Crafted in organic cotton, this dress combines form with function to bring you an easy to layer, versatile dress.

Spot a silver foiled star printed at the back.

name: Tisya Kurta - White
description:
name: Tisya Kurta - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Tisya Kurta is a refined and textured piece that combines subtelty with thoughtful detail. Made from 100% cotton, the white kurta features a beautifully textured fabric that adds depth and interest to its clean silhouette. 

Spot a fuchsia heart embroidery at the centre back for a touch of whimsy.

This kurta can be dressed up or down for both casual and semi-formal occasions.

name: Novel Narrow Pants - Purple
description:
name: Novel Narrow Pants - Purple, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Novel Narrow Pants feature a narrow silhouette in purple.

Crafted in 100% cotton, it pairs perfectly with kurtas and shirts alike, and promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet.

The design features gold triangle gota on the hem.

Spot an embroidered red moon on the right side bottom hem, just below the gold gota.

name: Recess Pants - Fuchsia & White Stripes
description:
name: Recess Pants - Fuchsia & White Stripes, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The coolest and comfiest pants, the Recess Pants stand out with their yarn-dyed stripes in fuchsia and white with a relaxed fit.

Crafted in 100% organic cotton, these pants combine style and ease.

The pants feature horizontal stripes on the waistband and back pocket.

Spot an green heart embroidered at the right pocket.

name: Akira Twist Back Dress - Green & Gold Embroidered
description:
name: Akira Twist Back Dress - Green & Gold Embroidered, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Nicobar’s Akira Twistback dress is tailored for around-the-clock activities, it comes in a super relaxed fit. With captivating dual motifs of the moon in gold zari and red thread against a green background, the design is inspired by our journey to Morocco and is a wonderful piece to add to your wardrobe. The moon is a motif cherished in both Nicobar and Moroccan cultures, the moon symbolises new beginnings and life’s cycles, reflecting renewal and transformation.

Crafted in cotton silk, this dress will leave you feeling light as air.

Dress this piece up or down for your everyday or celebrations alike.

name: Dori Blouse - Gold
description:
name: Dori Blouse - Gold, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
In a classic gold with sleeves, this blouse is a wardrobe essential. 

Crafted in a mix of metallised fibre and cotton, this blouse will leave you feeling light as air. 

The blouse has a dori at the back, adding to its design. 

This blouse pairs with the saris from our other collections.

name: Basic Mid Length Kurta - Charcoal Print
description:
name: Basic Mid Length Kurta - Charcoal Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
This easy-wearing kurta falls above the knee, and with its body-skimming fit, it pairs perfectly with pyjamas or a pair of jeans.

Crafted from 100% organic cotton voile, this lightweight, breathable fabric ensures all-day comfort.

The kurta features a charcoal base with an all-over jasmine jaal print, while a red heart embroidery at the under placket and a red star at the centre back add subtle, thoughtful touches. Cuff buttons are stitched with watermelon thread for a hint of contrast.

name: Kochi Kurta - Purple
description:
name: Kochi Kurta - Purple, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Elegant in its simplicity, the Kochi Kurta is a timeless piece with minimal detailing and maximum charm.The rich, solid purple base brings depth and versatility, easy to layer and ideal for both festive moments and your everyday. 

Crafted in 100% cotton kora, offering a crinkle and breathable comfort.

A single round gota flower embroidery sits on the wearer's right side.

This garment has a crinkled technique that should not be directly ironed.

name: Long Strappy Dress - Watermelon & White Checks
description:
name: Long Strappy Dress - Watermelon & White Checks, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Long Strappy Dress moves like summer itself—light, easy, and full of quiet detail.

Cut in yarn-dyed watermelon and white cotton checks, it features a long fit-and-flare silhouette with subtle tailoring through the bodice.

Finished with adjustable straps and a floral motif printed near the hem in soft silver and charcoal—just enough to catch the eye as you move.

name: Panaji Top - Dark Navy
description:
name: Panaji Top - Dark Navy, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Panaji Top is a wardrobe essential with a touch of quiet romance. Its rich dark navy hue offers a sophisticated base, while subtle details elevate the silhouette.

Crafted from cotton linter, a natural byproduct of cottonseed oil production, Bemberg is a regenerated cellulose fibre that’s soft, breathable, and gentle on the skin. It’s biodegradable, compostable, and made using a closed-loop process that minimises waste, making it a thoughtful choice for you and the planet.

A signature rose icon is delicately embroidered at the sleeve slits—red blooms with green leaves, mirrored perfectly on each side for visual harmony.

name: Ashwini Dress - Charcoal & Watermelon Print
description:
name: Ashwini Dress - Charcoal & Watermelon Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Ashwini Dress balances form and feeling—structured where it counts, fluid where it moves.

Printed with bold watermelon peonies on a charcoal cotton-silk Chanderi base, it brings contrast, softness, and just a hint of festive energy.

With a fit-and-flare silhouette and a clean neckline, it shifts easily from day to dinner—no added effort required. A check trim at the bottom hem adds a final, unexpected touch.

name: Miryam Dress - Berry
description:
name: Miryam Dress - Berry, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Miryam Dress in berry is made from 100% cotton single jersey in a soft, melange berry hue, offering a comfortable and easy fit.

It features rust-coloured fabric accents on the collar, cuffs, and placket for a striking contrast. 

The dress is finished with a bold embroidered tiget paw at the center back, adding a unique and playful touch to this stylish piece.

name: Amreli Kurta - Turmeric Yellow & Watermelon Print
description:
name: Amreli Kurta - Turmeric Yellow & Watermelon Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Amreli Kurta brings together colour and calm—bold in print, effortless in feel.

Printed with watermelon peonies on a turmeric yellow base, it’s crafted in organic cotton voile with a relaxed, fluid fit.

Subtle contrast stitching along the seams adds quiet definition, making it easy to wear from festive mornings to slow afternoons.

name: Ashwini Dress - Black
description:
name: Ashwini Dress - Black, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Ashwini Dress is a black, sleek and timeless piece crafted in soft yarn dyed cotton

Its solid black hue is complemented by vibrant aqua piping along the side pocket lip and a striking fuchsia Kantha stitch at the neckline.

Spot a delicate bullion knot embroidery graces the right bodice corner, adding a touch of charm to this chic, modern dress. 

Dress this piece up or down for your everyday or celebrations alike.

Perfect for effortless style with a hint of intricate detail.

name: Swish Pintuck Top - Purple
description:
name: Swish Pintuck Top - Purple, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Swish Pintuck Top stands out in a deep purple with an all over bandhani print.

Crafted in cupro modal, this top will leave you feeling light as air.

Dress this piece up or down for your everyday or celebrations alike.

Find an accent of striped moon patch inside. The hand tacking detail on the concealed placket adds to its design.

Spot an embroidered star in berry at the back.

name: Kaito Dress - Red & White Print
description:
name: Kaito Dress - Red & White Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Kaito Dress stands out in a bold red, scattered with white lotus blooms that nod to classic Japanese motifs.

A blue embroidered heart icon at the back adds a subtle contrast to this fit-and-flare silhouette, with contrast piping along the neckline and armhole for a clean, defined finish.

Made for brunches, balmy evenings, and days that call for colour.

name: Collared Dress - White
description:
name: Collared Dress - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Collared Dress is a refined yet playful piece that blends classic styling with thoughtful details. Made from a breathable mix of linen cotton, this dress offers the perfect balance of softness and structure in a serene white.

The tie-ups at the sleeve hems add a subtle, adjustable flair, allowing for a customizable fit and a touch of whimsy. The collar adds a classic touch.

Spot a fuchsia elephant embroidery at the center of the back yoke. 

Perfect for day-to-night wear, this versatile white dress brings an effortless sense of style and personality.

name: Lillian Front Gathered Dress - Yellow
description:
name: Lillian Front Gathered Dress - Yellow, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Lillian Front Gathered Dress is a bright yellow piece with a twisted front, one for the romantics.

Crafted in organic cotton, this dress combines form with function to bring you an easy to layer, versatile dress.

With fun details for a little flourish, this one is easy to slip into and will take you to Sunday brunches or cocktail nights under the starry sky.

Spot a silver foiled star at the back.

name: Strappy Blouse - Green & Red Print
description:
name: Strappy Blouse - Green & Red Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A sea of chintz roses on a green background and the straps makes this blouse is a wardrobe essential.

Crafted in cotton silk, this blouse will leave you feeling light as air.

The blouse has hook and thread detail at the back to close it.

This blouse pairs with the saris from our Morocco collection.

name: Tier Dress - Lilac
description:
name: Tier Dress - Lilac, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Elevate your summer wardrobe with this lilac dress, inspired by the stunning Cambodian skies. Featuring a breezy silhouette and graceful tiers, it's perfect for both professional and casual settings. 
Detailed with strap sleeves and smocked back.
The dress comes with pockets on both sides.
Tailored in handloom cotton.

name: Nova Pants - Black & Grey
description:
name: Nova Pants - Black & Grey, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
These flare pants feature a comfy paper-bag waistband to seamlessly fitinto.
Perfect for when you want to stay in or run quick errands around.
It can be dressed up or down. 
Crafted in 100% cotton.

name: Jodhpurs - Black
description:
name: Jodhpurs - Black, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A classic with a twist, our 100% cotton voile Jodhpurs are easy-fitting trousers which feature a bold lotus print pattern
They'll pair with shirts, t-shirts, and kurtas with equal ease

name: Midori Pants - Black & Ivory
description:
name: Midori Pants - Black & Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Our Midori Pants offer unparalleled comfort with their breezy fit, perfect for pairing with loafers and a crisp white shirt or sneakers and a cozy sweater for those laid-back vibes

 The big black and ivory checks in these comfortably fitted pants offer timeless appeal. Look out for the berry heart on the right side.

 It is crafted in 100% yarn-dyed cotton.

name: Floral Maxi Dress with Slip - Pink
description:
name: Floral Maxi Dress with Slip - Pink, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Enhance your summer wardrobe with this elegant floral maxi dress that features a tie-up wrap-around style
It comes with a matching solid slip with lace neckline.
The dress has pockets on both sides.
Inspired from the cotton candy skies of Cambodia.

name: Celeste Pyjamas - Ivory & Black
description:
name: Celeste Pyjamas - Ivory & Black, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A effortless slip-on pyjama with no zips, buttons, or nofuss, just ultra comfort. 
Features a monotone print.
Allows easy movement with its buttery soft fabric.
Crafted in buttery Bemberg made from wood pulp and manufactured into cellulosic fibre.
It’s 100% natural, renewable and biodegradable.

name: Kovai Kurta - Chocolate Brown & Gold Printed
description:
name: Kovai Kurta - Chocolate Brown & Gold Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Rich and refined, the Kovai Kurta offers a soft sheen and fluid drape.The deep chocolate brown base is adorned with vintage floral motifs in dual tone foil, adding a layer of timeless elegance.

Crafted in lustrous cotton-silk chanderi.

Thoughtful accents bring this piece to life—red buttons placed on the second placket button and at each cuff offer a striking contrast, while pocket bags in unprinted shell fabric maintain a seamless finish.

Perfect for festive gatherings or dressed-up everyday wear, this kurta blends heritage-inspired design with modern ease.

name: Tide Culottes - Indigo
description:
name: Tide Culottes - Indigo, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
These flare culottes in indigo are the easiest thing to pair with your everyday shirts and tees
Crafted in 100% organic cotton voile with indigo dip dye
There may be tinting on skin and/or lighter shade garment being paired together due to the natural Indigo colour

Note: Do not soak the piece or leave it unattended in soapy water for more than a minute.

name: Toddy Panelled Pants - White & Blue
description:
name: Toddy Panelled Pants - White & Blue, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
This bold, vertically striped monochrome pant is set to become your favourite with pockets and an elasticated waist that is easy to slip into
Crafted in 100% yarn dyed cotton with details like red heart embroidery at the lower pocket

name: Flayer Drawstring Pants - Navy
description:
name: Flayer Drawstring Pants - Navy, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 The bold blue and flared fit make the navy Flayer Drawstring Pants a standout choice for those who appreciate style with a playful twist. 

 Keep your essentials close at hand with the practical pocket design. 

 The drawstring waist not only adds a casual flair but also ensures a customised fit. 

 In soft yarn dyed cotton, these pants will leave you feeling light as air. 

 Pair it with any of the tops from our Zanzibar collection.

name: Strappy Smocked Dress - Black & Ivory
description:
name: Strappy Smocked Dress - Black & Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A bold and breezy, fit-and-flare smock dress with a shibori print that effortlessly transitions from downtime at home to days spent outdoors.

Crafted in 100% cotton voile with easy stripes.

Spot an embroidered red heart above the pocket.

Shibori is hand-dyed and will tint with each wash. We recommend not pairing it with light-coloured clothes and accessories while washing it.

name: Myra Overlay - Gold & Ivory
description:
name: Myra Overlay - Gold & Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 In ivory and gold this chic overlay is your go-to staple for the festive season. Perfect for all occasions, big or small—pair it with a kurta or layer with a sari to switch things up. Adjust to size with the drawstring, and keep your essentials in the pockets



 Crafted in silk tissue, comes in a fit and flare style. 

 Gold and ivory stripes print.

name: V-Neck Strappy Dress - Teal & Fuchsia Print
description:
name: V-Neck Strappy Dress - Teal & Fuchsia Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The V-Neck Strappy Dress makes a splash in with its romantic silhouette and teal and fuschsia palette, making it a statement piece.

The floral pattern adds beautifully to its design.

Crafted in organic cotton voile, this dress will leave you feeling light as air.

Dress this piece up or down for your everyday or celebrations alike.

name: Short Sleeve Kurta - White & Fuchsia Printed
description:
name: Short Sleeve Kurta - White & Fuchsia Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A well-cut kurta is a wardrobe essential, and Nicobar’s Short Sleeve Kurta pairs equally well with cigarette trousers or your regular blue jeans. This breathable piece features a striking fuchsia poppy print blooming across the front—an ode to Madagascar's flora.

Crafted in crisp cotton poplin.

Spot a purple star embroidered at the center back.

Tailored in a relaxed silhouette, this kurta blends statement design with everyday ease.

name: Tangier Top - Black & Gold Printed
description:
name: Tangier Top - Black & Gold Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Easy to pair and easier to wear, the Tangier Top brings effortless elegance to everyday dressing. Set against a deep black base, delicate autumn bloom motifs shimmer in a dual shade of gold and silver foil print, adding just the right touch of festive shine.

Lightweight and breathable in 100% organic cotton voile.

Cut in a flattering A-line silhouette a single green imitation button at the placket adds a hint of unexpected charm.

name: Mandarin Collar Top - Mulberry
description:
name: Mandarin Collar Top - Mulberry, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Made for days that blur work and everything after, this mulberry top walks the line between structure and ease.

Crafted in fluid Bemberg, it features a clean mandarin collar, a relaxed fit, and contrast detailing tucked inside the cuffs and back yoke.

It’s the details that linger: a purple heart hidden under the placket and a green parrot saddle-stitched onto the back panel for a quiet signature. Contrast finishes add just the right refinement to this understated silhouette.

name: Weekend Trousers - White
description:
name: Weekend Trousers - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A stitch at the knee switches up their silhouette, with deep pockets to hold your odds and ends.

Cut in super linen cotton, they'll take you everywhere! 

Spot an embroidered aqua heart at the front pocket.

name: Serene Pants - Navy & Green Printed
description:
name: Serene Pants - Navy & Green Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Elevate your style effortlessly with the most versatile addition to your wardrobe - a pair of pants featuring a refined green and navy thin stripe print that brings quiet sophistication to everyday dressing.

Form meets function, these pants feature two convenient patch pockets in the front, providing both practicality and a touch of flair.

A subtle touch of whimsy appears in the form of a red heart icon embroidered on one of the patch pocket.

They effortlessly pair with a variety of tops and accessories, making them a timeless and essential piece in your collection.

name: Basic Pyjamas - Chartreuse & Gold Printed
description:
name: Basic Pyjamas - Chartreuse & Gold Printed, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A style that's come to be our signature, this pyjama features an A-line silhouette that ends in a gentle flare.

The chartreuse base is printed with small gold palms, bringing in a soft, playful touch.

Crafted in 100% organic cotton voile, it pairs perfectly with kurtas and shirts alike, and promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet.

name: Yoka Trousers - White
description:
name: Yoka Trousers - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
An easy silhouette in relaxed cotton-linen comes with a snug waist and roomy pockets
 Pairs well with tunics and kurtas or one of our many billowy tops.

name: Puritsu Shirt Dress - White
description:
name: Puritsu Shirt Dress - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Puritsu Shirt Dress is all clean lines and quiet detail, with a fit-and-flare silhouette in crisp white.

Japanese knot loops at the cuffs finish in ties, each tipped with a handmade crochet dot.

A red star embroidered at the back adds a sharp little flourish to this otherwise pared-back piece.

name: Tropico Shirt - Bright Red
description:
name: Tropico Shirt - Bright Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
In a bright shade of red, the Tropico Shirt has got you covered day to night, season to season.

Crafted in 100% cotton, this shirt combines style and ease.

The silhouette offers a comfortable fit, perfect for both casual outings and special occasions.

The baby hem detail adds to its design.

Spot heart cuffs on the cuffs.

Spot an embroidered ivory star at the back.

name: Salem Pants - Red
description:
name: Salem Pants - Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Bold and full of character, the Salem Pants come in a rich solid red. With a gently puffy silhouette, these pants offer a playful yet polished look that's easy to dress up or down.

Crafted from cotton linter, a natural byproduct of cottonseed oil production, Bemberg is a regenerated cellulose fibre that’s soft, breathable, and gentle on the skin. It’s biodegradable, compostable, and made using a closed-loop process that minimises waste, making it a thoughtful choice for you and the planet.

Functional details include pockets and a relaxed fit for all-day comfort.

Spot a Mashru heart patch on wearer’s left side seam just above the hem—subtle, yet statement-making.

Perfect for festive pairings or as a standout everyday piece, style it with a simple top and flats for effortless charm.

name: Wide Paper Bag Trousers - Purple & White Checks
description:
name: Wide Paper Bag Trousers - Purple & White Checks, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Experience effortless style with our Wide Paper Bag Trousers in purple and white checks.

Made from 100% yarn-dyed cotton, these trousers feature an all-over pattern of uneven checks that lend them a handcrafted, lived-in charm. 

The relaxed silhouette is cinched at the waist with a classic paper bag finish, offering both comfort and a flattering fit. 

Spot a fuchsia heart embroidered near the right pocket..

Easy to pair and full of personality, they’re a fresh twist on a timeless favourite.

name: Sleeveless High Neck Kurta - Black & Red
description:
name: Sleeveless High Neck Kurta - Black & Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Kurtas are forever: our sleeveless high neck kurta is a classic. Crafted in buttery Bemberg, this kurta features an A-line silhouette and deep pockets. 

For a festive look, pair our Sleevless High Neck Kurta with gold jewellery.

 Crafted in Bemberg. Bemberg is extremely breathable and perfect all year around. The fabric is biodegradable as well.

name: Gusset Slit Kurta - White
description:
name: Gusset Slit Kurta - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Gusset Slit Kurta is a beautifully crafted, timeless piece that blends comfort with unique details. Made from a breathable mix of linen cotton, this kurta offers a light, relaxed fit that's perfect for warm weather. 

The fuchsia heart button at the placket adds a playful pop of colour. 

Spot an intricate saddle stitch embroidery at the back shoulder with a charming elephant motif, adding a touch of whimsy to the kurta.

With its clean lines and thoughtful accents, this kurta is versatile enough for casual days or dressed-up occasions, offering effortless style with a hint of fun.

name: Souk Drop Crotch Pants - Fuchsia & Ivory
description:
name: Souk Drop Crotch Pants - Fuchsia & Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
With a slouchy fit and cool silhouette, the Souk Drop Crotch Pants make a striped statement.

Crafted in comfy cotton, this is a breezy piece to wear anywhere and everywhere.

The yarn dyed stripes add texture and style to the design. Find different stripe directions for different panels, making this piece a statement one.

The palette and relaxed cut makes it easy to pair with any outfit, adding a touch of effortless style to your look.

name: Moon Pleated Kurta - Pink & Silver
description:
name: Moon Pleated Kurta - Pink & Silver, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Bright in pink, the Moon Pleated Kurta beams in yarn dyed cotton silk, making this one perfect for special celebrations.

The kurta features our contemporised version of the auspicious moon on silver foil print, making this perfect for special celebrations.

The hue and relaxed cut makes it easy to pair with any outfit, adding a touch of effortless style to your look.

name: Akira Pants - Blue & White Stripes
description:
name: Akira Pants - Blue & White Stripes, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Akira Pants bring stripes to life—blue and white zigzags in playful panels that add movement and dimension.

Made in 100% cotton, they’re breezy yet tailored, with a red Sakura embroidered on one leg for a touch of whimsy.

Wear them when you want comfort without compromising on character.

name: V-Neck Flared Kurta - Navy & Foil Print
description:
name: V-Neck Flared Kurta - Navy & Foil Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Crafted in cotton silk and featuring double moon motifs, this piece works effortlessly for your everyday and special occasions alike. The moon is a motif cherished in both Nicobar and Moroccan cultures, the moon symbolises new beginnings and life’s cycles, reflecting renewal and transformation.

The pattern and relaxed cut makes it easy to pair with any outfit, adding a touch of effortless style to your look.

Find an all over chaand foil print with a contrasting moonpatch inside.

The collar button and cuff buttons are stitched with red thread.

Find beaded edge detail on the sleeve ends.

name: Basic T-Shirt - Yellow
description:
name: Basic T-Shirt - Yellow, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Basics that are anything but basic; a comfortable organic cotton tee that promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet. 

 Pair with just about everything from jeans and shorts to trousers and skirts.

name: Novel Narrow Pants - Black
description:
name: Novel Narrow Pants - Black, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Novel Narrow Pants feature a narrow silhouette in black.

Crafted in 100% cotton, it pairs perfectly with kurtas and shirts alike, and promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet.

The design features gold triangle gota on the hem.

Spot an embroidered red moon on the right side bottom hem, just below the gold gota.

name: Gusset Slit Kurta - Black
description:
name: Gusset Slit Kurta - Black, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Gusset Slit Kurta is a modern, sophisticated piece with a striking blend of texture and detail. Crafted from 100% yarn-dyed cotton, the kurta features a solid black jaal pattern with alternating thick and thin stripes, creating dynamic visual interest. 

The overall directional stripes add depth and movement to the design, making it a standout piece. 

Spot a vibrant parrot embroidery, stitched with saddle stitch at the back. 

Dress this piece up or down for effortless style to throw on and go.

name: Picnic Culottes - Black & Ivory
description:
name: Picnic Culottes - Black & Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Crafted in 100% yarn-dyed cotton, the Picnic culottes are a fashion must-grab.

 The black and ivory hues with delicate checks are complemented by a Zanzibar-inspired green crocodile embroidery which elevates these pants beyond ordinary.

 It features convenient pockets for carrying essentials.

name: Basic T-Shirt - White
description:
name: Basic T-Shirt - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Basics that are anything but basic; a comfortable organic cotton tee that promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet. 

 Pair with just about everything from jeans and shorts to trousers and skirts.

name: Short Sleeve Kurta - Red & White
description:
name: Short Sleeve Kurta - Red & White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 In red and white, the breezy Short Sleeve Kurta draws inspiration from the Tingatinga art of Zanzibar, depicting a stylised and abstract take on the flowers we spotted on our travels. The relaxed fit and bright print makes it an easy pick for summer days. 

 The relaxed silhouette of the kurta features a fitted torso that gives way to a flared bottom. 

 Find a square heart shaped button at the placket. 

 In soft yarn dyed cotton, this kurta will leave you feeling light as air. 

 The long length provides an elegant silhouette, offering both comfort and style, making it suitable for casual outings, work, or cultural events. 

 Pair it with any of our solid pants from the Zanzibar collection.

name: Heart To Heart Dress - Red
description:
name: Heart To Heart Dress - Red, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Heart To Heart Dress speaks in bold red, with a gathered knot detail at the front that brings shape and intention.

A pixelated heart sits stitched near the hem—a small sign-off on a striking silhouette.

With its easy A-line fit, this one’s ready for dinners, dates, and everything in between.

name: Form Narrow Pants - Grey
description:
name: Form Narrow Pants - Grey, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Form Narrow Pants offer boundless comfort and style with an all over Bandhani print and comfortable fit.

The print in these comfortably fitted pants offer timeless appeal. Look out for the silver star at the back.

Crafted in lightweight material, it pairs perfectly with kurtas and shirts alike, and promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet

name: Back Gathered Top - Fuchsia & Purple Print
description:
name: Back Gathered Top - Fuchsia & Purple Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A vibrant ode to Madagascar’s tropical bloom, this A-line top is a colourful, easy piece to spend sunlit days and slow summer moments. Featuring an all-over print of medium purple poppies on a bold fuchsia base—lush, playful, and full of life.

Crafted in soft and breathable organic cotton voile.

A concealed placket keeps the silhouette clean, letting the print take centre stage.

With its easy A-line shape, gathered back and bright colour story, it’s made to move with you—from slow mornings to balmy evenings.

name: Areca Pants - Lime & Ivory
description:
name: Areca Pants - Lime & Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Areca Pants feature a harmonious blend of Shibori lime stripes for an added touch of fun, making them an essential wardrobe staple for any occasion.



Due to the nature of the fabric, no two pieces will be alike.

 Discover a touch of subtle charm with the heart embroidery positioned below the pocket corner on the wearer's left side. 

The pants gently flow from the waist down, elongating your legs and creating a balanced, flattering look.

 Pair them with pieces from our Zanzibar and Nico Core collection or with pieces you already own.

Shibori is hand-dyed and will tint with each wash. We recommend not pairing it with light-coloured clothes and accessories while washing it.

name: Uneven Hem Pants - Ivory
description:
name: Uneven Hem Pants - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
In a simple yet striking ivory, these pants are sure to become your new go-to for casual outings and weekend adventures.

Inspired by the land of the rising sun, the pants feature a red applique dot on one leg . 

Crafted in 100% cotton this silhouette guarantees both snugness and flexibility.

name: Kaiteki Pants - Navy Seersucker
description:
name: Kaiteki Pants - Navy Seersucker, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Kaiteki Pants in navy seersucker are easygoing, airy, and made for movement.

With front pockets and a red heart embroidered near one, they're full of little details that charm.

Pair with crisp shirts or flowing tops—these are your go-to for everyday ease with a playful twist.

name: Serene Pants - Lilac
description:
name: Serene Pants - Lilac, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
These pants offer a perfect combination of comfort and style and are inspired by the cotton candy skies of Cambodia. They are bound to enhance any outfit while keeping you comfortable throughout the entire season.
These have two patch pockets in the front and a grey heart embroidery detail. 
Elasticated wear. 
Tailored in handloom cotton.

name: Ayat Pyjamas - Magenta
description:
name: Ayat Pyjamas - Magenta, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Ayat Pyjamas in magenta are the perfect pair for special occasions, in comfy cotton kora with silver gota detailing along the sides.

With a flared fit, neutral hue, and versatile design, these pants are bound to become your go-to piece.

Spot ivory geometric icon embroidery near the slit.

Pairs well with the magenta Ayat Kurta.

name: Soto Flared Pants - White
description:
name: Soto Flared Pants - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 The comfortable Soto Flared Pants in white add a pop of colour to your outfit with the aqua and yellow selvedge on the front seam, our nod to sun-kissed waves and playful puddles. 

 Designed with your convenience in mind, the pants feature hanger loops for easy storage. 

 In soft yarn dyed cotton, these pants will leave you feeling light as air. 

 Pair it with any of the tops from our Zanzibar collection.

name: Shiro Hem Pants - Ivory
description:
name: Shiro Hem Pants - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Crafted with 100% yarn-dyed cotton and a thoughtful design, these pants offer both comfort and style, making them a versatile addition to your wardrobe.

 They stand out in ivory fabric contrasted by black and green selvedge detailing, accented with a green flower embroidery on the left pocket.

 It features waistband elastic for a comfortable fit and a flare design that flatters your silhouette.

name: Basic Pyjamas - Blue
description:
name: Basic Pyjamas - Blue, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Our Basic Pyjama is anything but basic. This style is a Nico signature and can be worn with just about anything. In shades of blue, they feature an all over shibori chevron print.

Crafted in light cotton, this makes for a comfy pick for days on the go.

The flared legs add a touch of feminine flair and style to the pyjama, ensuring you look and feel your best even during your most relaxed moments.

Spot a red embroidered star at the lower right pocket.

name: Ruffle Top - Navy & Grey
description:
name: Ruffle Top - Navy & Grey, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Tackle any outing with our Ruffle Top. Featuring a navy, red and white abstract floral print with silhouettes of dragonflies and parrots, there’s something romantic about this one. With its ruffled sleeves and elegant neckline, it’ll take you from the boardroom to the dance floor without breaking a sweat 

 The motifs are inspired by hand-painted motifs found on the walls of old African structures spotted on our travels to Zanzibar. 

 In soft organic cotton voile, this shirt will leave you feeling light as air. Finished with a baby hem, find a moon patch inside. 

 Best paired with solids to balance the print of the top.

name: Picnic Culottes - Navy & White
description:
name: Picnic Culottes - Navy & White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Sweet polkas from paradise make their way into the Picnic Culottes in a classic palette of navy and white. 

 Whether you're spreading out a blanket in the park or enjoying a beachside picnic, these culottes are a versatile wardrobe essential. 

The elastic at the back adapts to your body's natural curves, providing a flattering fit. 

 In soft, organic cotton voile, this dress will leave you feeling light as air. 

 Pair it with any of the tops from our Zanzibar collection.

name: Basic Pyjamas - Ivory
description:
name: Basic Pyjamas - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A style that's come to be our signature, this pyjama features an a-line silhouette that ends in a gentle flare. 

The ivory hue makes this an easy pick to spend your day in. 

Crafted in lightweight material, it pairs perfectly with kurtas and shirts alike, and promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet.

name: Maroc Pants - Blue
description:
name: Maroc Pants - Blue, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Our blue Maroc Pants in shibori stripes are a colourful addition to your wardrobe. 

Crafted in light cotton, this makes for a comfy pick for days on the go.

The flared legs add a touch of feminine flair and style to the pyjama, ensuring you look and feel your best even during your most relaxed moments.

Spot a red embroidered star at the lower right pocket.

name: Puff Pants - Coral
description:
name: Puff Pants - Coral, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Indulge in the allure of summer with these stylish pants, adorned with a delightful peony pattern. Designed to provide both comfort and style, they are meticulously tailored to ensure a perfect fit. 
The pleated construction adds an elegant puffiness, elevating the overall aesthetic. 
The smock detailing at the bottom of the hem adds a unique touch, enhancing the visual appeal. Practicality is not compromised, as the pants are tailored with built-in pockets, offering convenience for your essentials. 
Pair these pants with the Mekong Kurta.

name: Basic Pyjamas - Tangerine
description:
name: Basic Pyjamas - Tangerine, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Our basic pyjama that's anything but basic. This style has come to be our signature and can be worn with just about anything. And we mean that.


 It features an A-line silhouette that ends in a gentle, airy flare 

 This timeless pyjama is consciously crafted in cupro modal and promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet.

 The basic pyjamas come with pockets.

name: Basic Pyjamas - White & Teal Tssxnb
description:
name: Basic Pyjamas - White & Teal Tssxnb, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 With crisp white panels for a clean base and pops of teal in varying polka dot sizes, these bottoms will have you feeling bright and breezy all season long.

 In soft organic cotton voile, these pants will leave you feeling light as air.

 The spica elastic detail at the back guarantees both snugness and flexibility.

 Pair this with the kurtas and tunics from The Singleton Social x Nicobar collection, as well as white kurtas from Nico Core.

name: Basic Pyjamas - Black
description:
name: Basic Pyjamas - Black, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Our Basic Pyjama is anything but basic. This style is a Nico signature and can be worn with just about anything. And we mean that.

 Featuring a floral appliqué on the right leg, these pyjamas are convenient for storing essentials.

 Crafted from 100% cotton, it is designed in flattering flare fit.

name: Double Layer Dress - Ivory
description:
name: Double Layer Dress - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Built to be a staple for all seasons, our double layer dress crafted in linen cotton is great for a day at work or a meal with friends. 

The ivory hue and relaxed cut makes this an easy pick to spend your day in adding a touch of effortless style to your look. 

 Wear it with sneakers or strappy sandals, and dress it up with delicate jewellery.

name: Zanzibar Dress - Yellow
description:
name: Zanzibar Dress - Yellow, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
 Make a statement in the bright yellow Zanzibar Dress that lets you feel like you’re always on holiday. With strappy ties for the back, bright hue and subtle stripes, it’s the perfect dress to take for your travels . 

 The stripes bring a tasteful texture to the dress, making it visually appealing and interesting. 

 Beyond style, the tie-back serves a functional purpose, letting you tailor the dress to your comfort. 

 In yarn dyed cotton, this soft dress will leave you feeling light as air. 

 Pair it with any of the scarves from our Zanzibar collection.

name: Basic Pyjamas - Ochre
description:
name: Basic Pyjamas - Ochre, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A style that's come to be our signature, this pyjama features an a-line silhouette that ends in a gentle flare. 

The ochre hue makes this an easy pick to spend your day in. 

Crafted in lightweight material, it pairs perfectly with kurtas and shirts alike, and promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet.

name: Ayat Kurta with Slip - Ivory
description:
name: Ayat Kurta with Slip - Ivory, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Ayat Kurta is the perfect pick for celebrations. A regal piece in ivory, its free-flowing silhouette and silver gota detailing make this one stand out.

With silver gota detailing at both sides of centre back placket, yoke and sleeve hem, making it perfect for special occasions.

Comes with a slip to wear inside.

Spot tone on tone thread faggoting at the centre front.

name: Basic Pyjama - Deep Green
description:
name: Basic Pyjama - Deep Green, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
The Basic Pyjamas in deep green are the perfect pair for special occasions.

With a flared fit, neutral hue, and versatile design, these pants are bound to become your go-to piece.

Crafted in lightweight material, it pairs perfectly with kurtas and shirts alike, and promises to be the hardest working piece in your closet.

Antique gold gota embellishes the hemline, while red thread faggoting accents both side seams.

name: Ukiyo Racerback Tank - White
description:
name: Ukiyo Racerback Tank - White, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
A relaxed fitting racerback tank crafted in lightweight organic cotton
A layering essential that's equally good for pilates or pre-dinner drinks
Pair with just about everything from jeans and shorts to trousers and skirts

name: Mid Length Kurta - Khaki & White Stripes
description:
name: Mid Length Kurta - Khaki & White Stripes, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
An easy-wearing, relaxed kurta in khaki and white stripes with slits along the sides for fuss-free movement. Blending the calm of the desert with the wild spirit of the jungle, Safar is a collection designed for exploration—capturing the journey within, before it even begins.

Crafted in 100% yarn-dyed cotton. 

Spot a red heart and elephant embroidery at the back.

Great for travel, relaxed outings, or slow days spent lounging in comfort and style.

name: Happy Heart Dress - Purple & White Print
description:
name: Happy Heart Dress - Purple & White Print, brand/slogan: Nicobar, description: 
Bold yet breezy, the Happy Heart Dress channels the spirit of tropical escapes with a playful, romantic twist. An all-over print of oversized purple poppies blooms across a white base, making every step feel like summer.

Cut in crisp cotton poplin, it balances structure with ease—perfect for sun-filled days and unhurried afternoons.

The A-line silhouette offers a relaxed fit that flatters and flows, effortlessly moving with you.

Playful and striking, it’s a dress made for moments that feel as good as they look.
